$comment: Bounded context model derived from Prozorro public procurement tender JSON (tender.schema.json). Tracks tenders, bids, awards, and contracts from the Ukrainian Prozorro e-procurement platform.

enums.name: AwardCriteria
enums.description: Criteria used to select the winning bid

enums.name: AwardStatus
enums.description: Status of a tender award decision

enums.name: OrganizationKind
enums.description: Classification of a procuring entity kind

enums.name: OrganizationScale
enums.description: Size classification of a tenderer organization

boundedContexts.name: Prozorro
boundedContexts.description: Prozorro public procurement tracking bounded context — stores and queries tenders, bids, awards, and contracts sourced from the Ukrainian e-procurement platform

entities.name: Organization
entities.description: Procuring entity or tenderer organization imported from Prozorro

properties.name: ExternalId
properties.description: Prozorro organization identifier value (e.g. EDRPOU code)

properties.name: Owner
properties.description: Platform owner or source system slug

properties.name: AwardCriteria
properties.description: Criteria for selecting the winning bid

properties.name: ValueAddedTaxIncluded
properties.description: Whether the total amount includes VAT

properties.name: TenderPeriodStart
properties.description: Start of the tender acceptance period

properties.name: AwardPeriodStart
properties.description: Start of the award evaluation period

properties.name: AwardPeriodEnd
properties.description: End of the award evaluation period

properties.name: NoticePublicationDate
properties.description: Date the tender notice was published in Prozorro

properties.name: TenderDate
properties.description: Tender object creation timestamp from Prozorro

properties.name: AgreementId
properties.description: Related framework agreement ID from Prozorro

properties.name: ProcuringEntityId
properties.description: Organization acting as the procuring entity

properties.name: TenderChangeRationales
properties.description: Junction collection: contract change rationale types applicable to this tender

properties.name: TenderDocuments
properties.description: Junction collection: documents attached to this tender

entities.name: TenderItem
entities.description: Item or lot listed in a tender for procurement

properties.name: Profile
properties.description: Market profile reference (e.g. energy tariff profile ID)

entities.name: Bid
entities.description: Bid submitted by a tenderer in response to a tender

properties.name: BidDate
properties.description: Date the bid record was created

properties.name: SubmissionDate
properties.description: Date the bid was officially submitted

properties.name: ValueAddedTaxIncluded
properties.description: Whether the bid amount includes VAT

properties.name: InitialAmount
properties.description: Initial bid amount before any auction changes

properties.name: BidDocuments
properties.description: Junction collection: documents attached to this bid

entities.name: BidItem
entities.description: Item offered within a bid, with unit pricing

properties.name: ExternalId
properties.description: References the corresponding TenderItem external ID

properties.name: Description
properties.description: Item description as stated in the bid

entities.name: Award
entities.description: Award decision issued to a supplier after bid evaluation

properties.name: Qualified
properties.description: Whether the award passed qualification check

properties.name: PeriodStart
properties.description: Start of the award acceptance period

properties.name: PeriodEnd
properties.description: End of the award acceptance period

properties.name: BidExternalId
properties.description: External ID of the winning bid (from Prozorro)

properties.name: AwardDocuments
properties.description: Junction collection: documents attached to this award

entities.name: ContractChangeRationaleType
entities.description: Reference lookup for allowed contract change rationale codes on a tender

properties.name: TenderChangeRationales
properties.description: Junction collection: tenders that allow this rationale type

entities.name: TenderChangeRationale
entities.description: Junction table linking tenders to their allowed contract change rationale types

entities.name: Contract
entities.description: Procurement contract signed as a result of a tender award

properties.name: AwardExternalId
properties.description: External ID of the related award (awardID from Prozorro)

entities.name: TenderPlan
entities.description: Reference to a procurement plan linked to a tender

entities.name: Document
entities.description: Document attached to a tender, award, or bid

properties.name: DocumentType
properties.description: Prozorro document type code (e.g. notice, tenderNotice)

properties.name: DocumentOf
properties.description: Entity this document belongs to (tender, award, bid)

properties.name: RelatedItem
properties.description: External ID of the related item or lot

properties.name: DateModified
properties.description: Date the document was last modified

properties.name: TenderDocuments
properties.description: Junction collection: tenders this document is attached to

properties.name: AwardDocuments
properties.description: Junction collection: awards this document is attached to

properties.name: BidDocuments
properties.description: Junction collection: bids this document is attached to

entities.name: TenderDocument
entities.description: Junction linking a tender to an attached document

entities.name: AwardDocument
entities.description: Junction linking an award to an attached document

entities.name: BidDocument
entities.description: Junction linking a bid to an attached document

entities.name: Milestone
entities.description: Payment or delivery milestone associated with a tender

properties.name: Percentage
properties.description: Percentage of contract value for this milestone

entities.name: Criterion
entities.description: Qualification or technical criterion defined on a tender

properties.name: RelatesTo
properties.description: Entity this criterion relates to (lot, item, tender)

properties.name: RelatedItem
properties.description: External ID of the related item

entities.name: RequirementGroup
entities.description: Group of requirements within a criterion

entities.name: Requirement
entities.description: Individual requirement within a requirement group, defining expected values for bidder responses

properties.name: DataType
properties.description: Value data type (string, number, boolean, integer)

properties.name: ExpectedValuesJson
properties.description: JSON array of allowable expected values for multi-select requirements

properties.name: ExpectedMinItems
properties.description: Minimum number of matching expected values required

properties.name: ExpectedMaxItems
properties.description: Maximum number of matching expected values allowed

relationships.$comment: An organization can be the procuring entity for many tenders
A tender contains many items to be procured
An organization can submit bids as tenderer
A bid contains many offered items with unit pricing
A tender has many award decisions
An organization can receive multiple awards as supplier
A tender results in one or more contracts
A tender declares which contract change rationale types are applicable (M2M via junction)
A tender references one or more procurement plans
A tender has many attached documents (M2M via junction)
An award has many attached documents (M2M via junction)
A bid has many attached documents (M2M via junction)
A tender has many payment or delivery milestones
A tender defines many qualification or technical criteria
A criterion contains many requirement groups
A requirement group contains many individual requirements
